_comment: Each brief stresses a specific rule. Vary axes deliberately. Grade with rubric.md.

briefs.prompt: Landing page for a B2B analytics SaaS. Clean, trustworthy, fast.
Bold portfolio site for a motion-design studio. Make it memorable.
Marketing site for a banking app. The founder loves brutalism.
stresses: surface the conflict, don't silently ship mismatch

briefs.prompt: A login form component for an existing Radix-based app.
A page for a new product. No brand assets, no colors given.
Add a pricing section to my existing site (tokens already defined).
Product launch page with a 3D hero. Should feel premium but load well.
A privacy policy / terms page for a healthcare app. Make it trustworthy and easy to read.
stresses: no scroll spectacle on a legal page
intentional quiet still has a signature + clear hierarchy
over-ambition is a FAIL here, not a win
briefs.anti_pattern: kinetic type, scroll-jacking, 3D, statement-mode spectacle on a document-class page

briefs.prompt: A dense internal admin table view: 12 columns, filters, bulk actions. Get out of the user's way.
stresses: no hero, no narrative, no motion theatre
signature lives in interaction quality, not spectacle
briefs.anti_pattern: decorative motion, oversized hero, statement techniques, accent overuse on a utility surface
